visual_intent: mist-blue calm with generous negative space
brand_guardrails: keep continuity with the March 25 Set 4 story
preserve top and bottom safe zones
keep typography stable across all 3 frames
do not generate fake poll UI or placeholder boxes
keep text color density, opacity, and typographic presence visually consistent across all 3 frames
composition: one short message block per frame
subtle lifestyle image support with clean reading zone
frame 3 must leave lower-third space for the native Poll Sticker
mist-blue and cloud-white atmosphere with restrained steel-blue structure
reference_strategy: Use the approved Set 4 lifestyle reference and the March 25 story frames as the primary continuity anchors, then keep the March 26 story more question-led and interaction-ready without changing the typographic personality.
variation_guardrails: make the sequence more question-led than March 25
keep the environment similar but not identical
use more intentional lower-third space on frame 3
avoid exact crop or hand placement matching from the references

batch_lock.text_color: dark charcoal, visually consistent across all frames
batch_lock.weight_presence: same medium-weight feel across all frames

slides_ja: 刺激で押し切りたくなる。
でも最近は、整える方がしっくりくる。
今の自分はどっちに近い？ 気分に近い方を選んでください。

notes: March 26 interactive poll story. Keep it in the same Set 4 world as March 25, but make it more obviously response-ready. Frame 3 must stay clean for the native Poll Sticker.
